chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 653 of 2023 CP D 2711 of 2023 CP D 654 of 2023 CP D 655 of 2023 CP D 656 of 2023 CP D 657 of 2023 CP D 658 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.2962/2023. 2. For hearing of main case. 02.05.2025 Mr. Mamoon N. Chaudhry, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Asad Ahmed, advocate for the respondent No.3. Mr. Manzoor ul Haq, advocate for the respondent No.4. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General. Per learned counsel for the petitioners, essentially grievance of the petitioners is that their application / representation before the Trade Development Authority of Pakistan with respect to inland freight subsidy has not been determined and remains pending with TDAP. Learned counsel presses petitions to the extent that concerned respondent / TDAP may be directed to decide all such representations expeditiously, preferably within 30 days’ time, vide speaking order and after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. Learned counsel for the TDAP has no objection to the aforesaid and states that petitions may be disposed of in the aforesaid terms. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in each connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
